name: dramaforge
description: 端到端短剧生成平台：主题→剧本→分镜→图/视频/配音→成片合成

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @dramaforge/server" "npm run dev -w @dramaforge/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @dramaforge/shared && npm run build -w @dramaforge/server && npm run build -w @dramaforge/web
